title: burgered
body:
# Burgered Have you ever wanted infinitely stackable (technically 2048 ingredients, but who's really counting) burgers in Minecraft, well I've got the mod for you! With every ingredient having their own hunger and saturation values, every burger you make can be eaten (You can even eat the individual ingredients)! You can even turn vanilla items into burger ingredients (with datapacks), learn more in the [wiki](https://github.com/wired-tomato/burgered/wiki)! Burgers take half a second to eat for every ingredient on them with a maximum time of 2 seconds! Here's a list of ingredients currently included in the mod: - Top Bun - Bottom Bun - (Raw) Beef Patty - Cheese Slice - Lettuce - An Edible Book - Pickled Beets
## Getting Started Simply craft a burger stacker and start stacking some ingredients! When your done, shift right click on the stacker to get your burger! ![Burger Stacker Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8ab41afc5f1384cc9dcb6d1b66d45ef46fd714d.png) ![Simple Cheeseburger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c33fb22aad2c531229071f80bc9a2a676e4db455.png)
